mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) AS totalServices, SUM(CASE WHEN t.status = 'UP' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS upCount, SUM(CASE WHEN t.status = 'DOWN' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS downCount, SUM(CASE WHEN t.status = 'WARNING' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS warningCount, CAST(ROUND(AVG(t.avg_response_time), 2) AS DECIMAL(10,2)) AS avgResponseTime FROM ( SELECT sm.* FROM system_monitor sm INNER JOIN ( SELECT service_name, MAX(report_time) AS max_report_time FROM system_monitor GROUP BY service_name ) latest ON sm.service_name = latest.service_name AND sm.report_time = latest.max_report_time ) t

SELECT sm.* FROM system_monitor sm INNER JOIN ( SELECT service_name, MAX(report_time) AS max_report_time FROM system_monitor GROUP BY service_name ) latest ON sm.service_name = latest.service_name AND sm.report_time = latest.max_report_time
AND sm.service_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{serviceName}, '%')
AND sm.status = #{status}
ORDER BY sm.report_time DESC, sm.service_name ASC
